description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux MinGW that runs on push and pull request events. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy for x86_64 architecture and gcc or clang compilers. For each matrix entry, check out the repository, then run a Docker container with the archlinux:latest image to install dependencies, build, and deploy. Additionally, perform a VirusTotal scan and upload release or daily build artifacts to a private repository on GitHub.
